sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67618" key="mhxaneu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μηχᾰν-εύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n67618.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contriver</tr_>, epith. of Zeus at Argos, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:22:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.22.2</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Μαχανεύς</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
